sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: AQA GCSE Biology (8461), Version 1.0, 21 April 2016, for teaching from September 2016, exams from 2018.
Linear qualification with Paper 1 (Topics 1-4) and Paper 2 (Topics 5-7), each 1h45m, 100 marks, 50%, Foundation/Higher Tier.
AO1 40%, AO2 40%, AO3 20%; per-paper ranges provided.
Paper 1 and Paper 2 each scaled x1 to 100; total 200.
Foundation Tier grades 1-5; Higher Tier grades 4-9 (allowed 3).
WS 1.1-1.6, WS 2.1-2.7, WS 3.1-3.8, WS 4.1-4.3; left-column skills extracted, right-column examples treated as skill opportunities.
Topics 4.1-4.8 with specification points; two-column layout with content on left and skill opportunities on right.
10 required practical activities with AT coverage and key skill opportunities; first four sampled.

sections_not_extracted.section: Introduction / Why choose AQA / Support resources

split_recommendations.assessment_json: Paper split, AO weightings, tiers, working scientifically (p.8, p.78-80, p.9-14).
split_recommendations.references: Right-column skill opportunities, mathematical requirements, apparatus/techniques, required practicals (p.83, p.85-91).

known_risks: Single-channel text extraction; visual review of two-column separation pending.
Right-column skill opportunities may have merged with left-column content in places.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at not captured in local archive metadata.
PDF is encrypted but copy-allowed; extraction relies on pdftotext decryption.
notes: Extraction completed without copying official PDF text. Page-map mappings use printed/page numbers.
